overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a waterfront shantytown at sunset. The character walks along wooden docks past moored boats, then turns into a dense informal settlement with corrugated metal shacks, before emerging into an industrial area with a passing train. The scene features warm golden hour lighting with a prominent steel truss bridge visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock along waterfront with moored fishing boats

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the steel bridge, passing moored fishing boats on the left

notable_agents.action: standing on the deck of a moored fishing boat, facing toward the water

entered.detail: large steel cantilever bridge spanning the river, silhouetted against the sunset
elevated concrete highway overpass running parallel to the waterfront
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway, with wooden posts and railings
small wooden fishing boat with cabin, tied to the dock with ropes
dense cluster of mid-rise apartment buildings and towers across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wooden dock at golden hour, with the steel truss bridge dominating the center view and the city skyline visible across the water. A fishing boat is moored to the left with an NPC standing on its deck, while the camera moves steadily forward along the weathered planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shantytown walkway with corrugated metal and wooden shacks

events.description: turns right off the wooden dock and enters the shantytown area with makeshift structures

agents.ego_description: turning right off the dock and walking into the shantytown area on elevated wooden walkways

notable_agents.action: standing on the wooden walkway wearing a red shirt, holding a fishing rod

entered.detail: elevated wooden path with railings leading through the shantytown
makeshift structure built from wood and corrugated metal with blue tarp
tall palm trees growing among the shantytown structures
small shelter with rusted corrugated metal walls and wooden supports
steep wooden staircase leading up the hillside between shacks

segments.scene_description: Turning right off the dock into a shantytown area with wooden walkways and makeshift structures. The steel bridge disappears from view as the camera enters the settlement, while palm trees and corrugated metal shacks line the path. An NPC in a red shirt stands on the walkway ahead, facing the camera as it approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shantytown path with makeshift housing and dense foliage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow dirt paths in the shantytown, passing corrugated metal shacks and palm trees

notable_agents.action: sitting on the ground near a yellow tarp shelter, resting against a wall

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with scattered debris and puddles
old yellow farm tractor parked near a concrete building
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
small weathered concrete block building with green tarp roof
large stack of discarded vehicle tires piled against the building

segments.scene_description: Proceeding deeper into the shantytown along narrow dirt paths surrounded by dense palm trees and makeshift housing built from corrugated metal and wood. The area is heavily shaded with dappled sunlight filtering through the foliage, and an NPC sits resting near a yellow tarp shelter on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with tractor, tire piles, and train tracks

events.description: yellow passenger train passes by on tracks in the background, moving from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial yard toward the train tracks, passing the parked tractor

entered.detail: railway tracks running parallel to the path with gravel bed
long yellow commuter train with multiple cars passing along the tracks
large metal lattice electrical transmission tower

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a more open industrial yard with scattered debris, tire piles, and a yellow tractor parked near a concrete building. A yellow passenger train passes by on tracks in the background, moving through the urban landscape with apartment buildings and electrical towers visible in the distance under the golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open waterfront dock into a dense shantytown before emerging into an industrial yard. It begins by moving steadily along weathered wooden planks toward a dominating steel truss bridge and a distant city skyline, passing a moored fishing boat with a figure on deck. As the camera turns right off the dock, the bridge disappears from view and the environment shifts into a settlement of corrugated metal shacks and palm trees, where an NPC in a red shirt stands on a wooden walkway. The path then narrows into a shaded interior of makeshift housing and dirt trails with dappled sunlight filtering through foliage, passing a resting figure near a yellow tarp. Finally, the scene opens up into a wide industrial yard filled with debris and a parked yellow tractor, just as a yellow passenger train passes by against a backdrop of electrical towers and apartment buildings under the golden hour light.
